evals.prompt: I want the expert-curated Cancer Gene Census from COSMIC so I can filter my variant list down to known cancer genes and split them into oncogenes vs tumor suppressors.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-cosmic: downloads cancer_gene_census.csv via download_cosmic_file (authenticated), then uses the 'Role in Cancer' field to separate oncogenes from TSGs from the ~700+ curated cancer genes.

evals.prompt: Download the COSMIC coding mutations file (GRCh38) and pull all the recurrent somatic TP53 mutations for my cancer cohort analysis.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-cosmic: downloads CosmicMutantExport.tsv.gz for GRCh38 via download_cosmic_file, reads it with pandas, and filters by Gene name == 'TP53' to extract somatic mutations.

assertions.value: Retrieves somatic coding mutations from a downloaded COSMIC export (GRCh38) and filters to the named gene, with authentication.

evals.prompt: I need the COSMIC SBS mutational signature definitions to run signature decomposition on my whole-genome tumor samples.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-cosmic: downloads the mutational signature profiles (SBS/DBS/ID definitions) from COSMIC's signatures path, suitable for feeding into signature-analysis tools like SigProfiler or deconstructSigs.

evals.prompt: Get me COSMIC's drug resistance mutation data so I can annotate which variants in my samples confer known resistance.
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-cosmic: downloads CosmicResistanceMutations.tsv.gz via the resistance_mutations shortcut and surfaces the clinically annotated drug-resistance variants.

assertions.value: Downloads the COSMIC resistance mutations file specifically, not generic mutation data.

evals.prompt: Is the germline BRCA1 c.68_69delAG variant classified as pathogenic? I need the clinical significance and review status.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT invoke this skill; defers to alterlab-clinvar. The user wants germline variant clinical-significance classification, whereas COSMIC catalogues somatic mutations in cancer, not germline pathogenicity calls.

evals.prompt: Show me the mutation frequency of EGFR across the TCGA lung adenocarcinoma study with an OncoPrint and survival breakdown.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT invoke this skill; defers to alterlab-cbioportal. The user wants interactive cohort-level visualization (OncoPrint, survival) from cBioPortal study data, not raw COSMIC catalogue file downloads.
